DormHallway.Body: You're standing in the hallway outside your dorm room. You reach for your student ID to swipe in — and your stomach drops. It's gone. You retrace your steps in your head. Where did you last have it?

McHenry.Body: The library is quiet except for the hum of AC and the frantic typing of people who are starting to study for midterms. You head upstairs to the study rooms.
McHenry.MemoryText: You remember being here two nights ago with your friends Josh and Kaylie, all three of you cramming for a CS midterm. Josh fell asleep on the keyboard. You were the last one to leave.

Choices.Text: Check under the study room tables

McHenryFloor2.Body: You crouch down and look under every chair and table in the room. A forgotten Yerba Mate. Someone's pencil. No ID.

Choices.Text: Give up on the library and go to the Quarry

Quarry.Body: The Quarry is busy as always. The smell of food trucks drifts past you as students eat lunch on the benches. You scan the ground as you walk. Nothing yet.

Choices.Text: Talk to the cashier in Slug Stop

SlugStop.Body: The barista shakes their head. 'No lost cards here, sorry.' Then they pause. 'Actually — your roommate was just here like ten minutes ago. Said they were heading to the bus stop.'
NPCMessages: Actually your roommate was just here. Said they were heading to the bus stop.

BusStop.Body: The 19 is idling at the stop, doors open. You're scanning faces — and then you see them. Your roommate, headphones in, waiting to board.

Choices.Text: Calmly ask if they can let you into the room

RoommateChat.Body: Your roommate listens. There's a pause.

Choices.Text: Walk back to the dorm together

DormRoom.Body: Finally inside. You search everywhere — desk, floor, under the bed, inside your hoodie pocket. And then, stuck between the edge of your twin XL — there it is. Your student ID.

DiningHall.Body: You swipe in just in time for the lunch rush. You grab your food and sit down, relieved.
